title: [InstCombine] Fold select of neg/not into sext-sub
author: sweiglbosker
description:
Adds the following folds:
- `select C, (sub 0, Y), (xor Y, -1) -> sub (sext !C), Y`
- `select C, (xor Y, -1), (sub 0, Y) -> sub (sext C), Y`

The original motivation is the high half of a two-word negation (See #198179 for more details):

```ll
define i64 @f(i64 %lo, i64 %hi) {
entry:
  %not.hi = xor i64 %hi, -1
  %lo.is.zero = icmp eq i64 %lo, 0
  %neg.hi = sub i64 0, %hi
  %r = select i1 %lo.is.zero, i64 %neg.hi, i64 %not.hi
  ret i64 %r
}
```

Which can be folded to:

```ll
define i64 @f(i64 %lo, i64 %hi) {
entry:
  %lo.not.zero = icmp ne i64 %lo, 0
  %mask = sext i1 %lo.not.zero to i64
  %r = sub i64 %mask, %hi
  ret i64 %r
}
```

Proofs: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/DATqof
Fixes: #198179

tests.test_body:
target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i32 @select_freeze_icmp_else(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %c = icmp ult i32 %x, %y
  %c.fr = freeze i1 %c
  %v = select i1 %c.fr, i32 %x, i32 %y
  ret i32 %v
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

declare void @use_i1_i32(i1, i32)

define void @select_freeze_icmp_multuses(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
  %c = icmp ne i32 %x, %y
  %c.fr = freeze i1 %c
  %v = select i1 %c.fr, i32 %x, i32 %y
  call void @use_i1_i32(i1 %c.fr, i32 %v)
  ret void
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_eq(i64 %lo, i64 %hi) {
entry:
  %not.hi = xor i64 %hi, -1
  %lo.is.zero = icmp eq i64 %lo, 0
  %neg.hi = sub i64 0, %hi
  %r = select i1 %lo.is.zero, i64 %neg.hi, i64 %not.hi
  ret i64 %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @no_fold_wrong_not_constant(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub i64 0, %y
  %notish = xor i64 %y, 123
  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %notish
  ret i64 %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @fold_select_twoword_neg_hi(i64 %lo, i64 %hi) {
entry:
  %neg.lo = sub i64 0, %lo
  %lo.is.zero = icmp eq i64 %lo, 0
  %neg.hi = sub i64 0, %hi
  %not.hi = xor i64 %hi, -1
  %new.hi = select i1 %lo.is.zero, i64 %neg.hi, i64 %not.hi
  %sum = add i64 %neg.lo, %new.hi
  ret i64 %sum
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @no_fold_wrong_neg_operand(i1 %c, i64 %x, i64 %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub i64 0, %x
  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
  ret i64 %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define <2 x i64> @no_fold_vec_mismatch(<2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %x, <2 x i64> %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, %x
  %not = xor <2 x i64> %y, splat (i64 -1)
  %r = select <2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %neg, <2 x i64> %not
  ret <2 x i64> %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

declare void @use_v2i64(<2 x i64>)

define <2 x i64> @no_fold_vec_multuse(<2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, %y
  %not = xor <2 x i64> %y, splat (i64 -1)
  %r = select <2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %neg, <2 x i64> %not
  call void @use_v2i64(<2 x i64> %neg)
  ret <2 x i64> %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i8 @fold_select_not_neg_i8(i1 %c, i8 %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub i8 0, %y
  %not = xor i8 %y, -1
  %r = select i1 %c, i8 %not, i8 %neg
  ret i8 %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_nsw(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub nsw i64 0, %y
  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
  ret i64 %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define <2 x i64> @no_fold_select_neg_not_vec_non_splat(<2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, %y
  %not = xor <2 x i64> %y, <i64 -1, i64 0>
  %r = select <2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %neg, <2 x i64> %not
  ret <2 x i64> %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define <2 x i64> @fold_select_neg_not_vec_splat(<2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, %y
  %not = xor <2 x i64> %y, splat (i64 -1)
  %r = select <2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %neg, <2 x i64> %not
  ret <2 x i64> %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i32 @fold_select_neg_not_i32(i1 %c, i32 %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub i32 0, %y
  %not = xor i32 %y, -1
  %r = select i1 %c, i32 %neg, i32 %not
  ret i32 %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_nuw_nsw(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub nuw nsw i64 0, %y
  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
  ret i64 %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @fold_select_not_neg_ne(i64 %lo, i64 %hi) {
entry:
  %not.hi = xor i64 %hi, -1
  %lo.not.zero = icmp ne i64 %lo, 0
  %neg.hi = sub i64 0, %hi
  %r = select i1 %lo.not.zero, i64 %not.hi, i64 %neg.hi
  ret i64 %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @no_fold_wrong_neg_shape(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
entry:
  %negish = sub i64 1, %y
  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %negish, i64 %not
  ret i64 %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_commuted_xor(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub i64 0, %y
  %not = xor i64 -1, %y
  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
  ret i64 %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

declare void @use_i64(i64)

define i64 @no_fold_multuse_neg(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub i64 0, %y
  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
  call void @use_i64(i64 %neg)
  ret i64 %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_nuw(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub nuw i64 0, %y
  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
  ret i64 %r
}

target datalayout = "e-p:64:64-p1:16:16-p2:32:32:32-p3:64:64:64"

declare void @use_i64(i64)

define i64 @no_fold_multuse_not(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
entry:
  %neg = sub i64 0, %y
  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
  call void @use_i64(i64 %not)
  ret i64 %r
}

comments.author: llvmorg-github-actions[bot]
comments.body:
<!--LLVM PR SUMMARY COMMENT-->

@llvm/pr-subscribers-llvm-transforms

Author: Stefan Weigl-Bosker (sweiglbosker)

<details>
<summary>Changes</summary>

Adds the following folds:
- `select C, (sub 0, Y), (xor Y, -1) -> sub (sext !C), Y`
- `select C, (xor Y, -1), (sub 0, Y) -> sub (sext C), Y`

The original motivation is the high half of a two-word negation (See #<!-- -->198179 for more details):

```ll
define i64 @<!-- -->f(i64 %lo, i64 %hi) {
entry:
  %not.hi = xor i64 %hi, -1
  %lo.is.zero = icmp eq i64 %lo, 0
  %neg.hi = sub i64 0, %hi
  %r = select i1 %lo.is.zero, i64 %neg.hi, i64 %not.hi
  ret i64 %r
}
```

Which can be folded to:

```ll
define i64 @<!-- -->f(i64 %lo, i64 %hi) {
entry:
  %lo.not.zero = icmp ne i64 %lo, 0
  %mask = sext i1 %lo.not.zero to i64
  %r = sub i64 %mask, %hi
  ret i64 %r
}
```

Proofs: https://alive2.llvm.org/ce/z/DATqof
Fixes: #<!-- -->198179

---
Full diff: https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/198225.diff


2 Files Affected:

- (modified) llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSelect.cpp (+44) 
- (modified) llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/select.ll (+301) 


``````````diff
diff --git a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSelect.cpp b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSelect.cpp
index a064aa1016399..0377a81481eb0 100644
--- a/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSelect.cpp
+++ b/llvm/lib/Transforms/InstCombine/InstCombineSelect.cpp
@@ -4417,6 +4417,47 @@ static Value *foldSelectBitTest(SelectInst &Sel, Value *CondVal, Value *TrueVal,
   return nullptr;
 }
 
+// This function makes the following folds:
+// select C, (sub 0, X), (xor X, -1)
+//   -> sub (sext !C), X
+// select C, (xor X, -1), (sub 0, X)
+//   -> sub (sext C), X
+static Instruction *foldSelectNegNot(SelectInst &SI, InstCombiner::BuilderTy &Builder) {
+  auto *CondVal = SI.getCondition();
+  auto *TrueVal = SI.getTrueValue();
+  auto *FalseVal = SI.getFalseValue();
+  auto *SelTy = SI.getType();
+
+  if (!SelTy->isIntOrIntVectorTy() || SelTy->isIntOrIntVectorTy(1))
+    return nullptr;
+
+  if (CondVal->getType()->isVectorTy() != SelTy->isVectorTy())
+    return nullptr;
+
+  auto matchNegNot = [&](Value *Neg, Value *Not, Value *&X) -> bool {
+    return match(Neg, m_OneUse(m_Sub(m_Zero(), m_Value(X)))) &&
+           match(Not, m_OneUse(m_c_Xor(m_Specific(X), m_AllOnes())));
+  };
+
+  Value *X;
+  Value *Mask;
+
+  // select C, (sub 0, X), (xor X, -1) -> sub (sext !C), X
+  if (matchNegNot(TrueVal, FalseVal, X)) {
+    Value *NotCond = Builder.CreateNot(CondVal, "not." + CondVal->getName());
+    Mask = Builder.CreateSExt(NotCond, SelTy);
+    return BinaryOperator::CreateSub(Mask, X);
+  }
+
+  // select C, (xor X, -1), (sub 0, X) -> sub (sext C), X
+  if (matchNegNot(FalseVal, TrueVal, X)) {
+    Mask = Builder.CreateSExt(CondVal, SelTy);
+    return BinaryOperator::CreateSub(Mask, X);
+  }
+
+  return nullptr;
+}
+
 Instruction *InstCombinerImpl::visitSelectInst(SelectInst &SI) {
   Value *CondVal = SI.getCondition();
   Value *TrueVal = SI.getTrueValue();
@@ -4505,6 +4546,9 @@ Instruction *InstCombinerImpl::visitSelectInst(SelectInst &SI) {
     }
   }
 
+  if (Instruction *I = foldSelectNegNot(SI, Builder))
+    return I;
+
   auto *SIFPOp = dyn_cast<FPMathOperator>(&SI);
 
   if (auto *FCmp = dyn_cast<FCmpInst>(CondVal)) {
diff --git a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/select.ll b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/select.ll
index 4110f6691a76b..81d3f49b66547 100644
--- a/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/select.ll
+++ b/llvm/test/Transforms/InstCombine/select.ll
@@ -2887,6 +2887,8 @@ define i32 @select_freeze_icmp_else(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
 }
 
 declare void @use_i1_i32(i1, i32)
+declare void @use_i64(i64)
+declare void @use_v2i64(<2 x i64>)
 
 define void @select_freeze_icmp_multuses(i32 %x, i32 %y) {
 ; CHECK-LABEL: define void @select_freeze_icmp_multuses(
@@ -5419,3 +5421,302 @@ exit:
   store i8 %res, ptr %out, align 1
   ret void
 }
+
+define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_eq(i64 %lo, i64 %hi) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_eq(
+; CHECK-SAME: i64 [[LO:%.*]], i64 [[HI:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LO_IS_ZERO:%.*]] = icmp ne i64 [[LO]], 0
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = sext i1 [[LO_IS_ZERO]] to i64
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = sub i64 [[TMP0]], [[HI]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
+;
+entry:
+  %not.hi = xor i64 %hi, -1
+  %lo.is.zero = icmp eq i64 %lo, 0
+  %neg.hi = sub i64 0, %hi
+  %r = select i1 %lo.is.zero, i64 %neg.hi, i64 %not.hi
+  ret i64 %r
+}
+
+define i64 @fold_select_not_neg_ne(i64 %lo, i64 %hi) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @fold_select_not_neg_ne(
+; CHECK-SAME: i64 [[LO:%.*]], i64 [[HI:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LO_NOT_ZERO_NOT:%.*]] = icmp ne i64 [[LO]], 0
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = sext i1 [[LO_NOT_ZERO_NOT]] to i64
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = sub i64 [[TMP0]], [[HI]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
+;
+entry:
+  %not.hi = xor i64 %hi, -1
+  %lo.not.zero = icmp ne i64 %lo, 0
+  %neg.hi = sub i64 0, %hi
+  %r = select i1 %lo.not.zero, i64 %not.hi, i64 %neg.hi
+  ret i64 %r
+}
+
+define i32 @fold_select_neg_not_i32(i1 %c, i32 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i32 @fold_select_neg_not_i32(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[C:%.*]], i32 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_C:%.*]] = xor i1 [[C]], true
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = sext i1 [[NOT_C]] to i32
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = sub i32 [[TMP0]], [[Y]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i32 [[R]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg = sub i32 0, %y
+  %not = xor i32 %y, -1
+  %r = select i1 %c, i32 %neg, i32 %not
+  ret i32 %r
+}
+
+define i8 @fold_select_not_neg_i8(i1 %c, i8 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i8 @fold_select_not_neg_i8(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[C:%.*]], i8 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = sext i1 [[C]] to i8
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = sub i8 [[TMP0]], [[Y]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i8 [[R]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg = sub i8 0, %y
+  %not = xor i8 %y, -1
+  %r = select i1 %c, i8 %not, i8 %neg
+  ret i8 %r
+}
+
+define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_commuted_xor(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_commuted_xor(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[C:%.*]], i64 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_C:%.*]] = xor i1 [[C]], true
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = sext i1 [[NOT_C]] to i64
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = sub i64 [[TMP0]], [[Y]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg = sub i64 0, %y
+  %not = xor i64 -1, %y
+  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
+  ret i64 %r
+}
+
+define i64 @fold_select_twoword_neg_hi(i64 %lo, i64 %hi) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @fold_select_twoword_neg_hi(
+; CHECK-SAME: i64 [[LO:%.*]], i64 [[HI:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[LO_IS_ZERO:%.*]] = icmp ne i64 [[LO]], 0
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = sext i1 [[LO_IS_ZERO]] to i64
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP1:%.*]] = add i64 [[HI]], [[LO]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SUM:%.*]] = sub i64 [[TMP0]], [[TMP1]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[SUM]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg.lo = sub i64 0, %lo
+  %lo.is.zero = icmp eq i64 %lo, 0
+  %neg.hi = sub i64 0, %hi
+  %not.hi = xor i64 %hi, -1
+  %new.hi = select i1 %lo.is.zero, i64 %neg.hi, i64 %not.hi
+  %sum = add i64 %neg.lo, %new.hi
+  ret i64 %sum
+}
+
+define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_nsw(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_nsw(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[C:%.*]], i64 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_C:%.*]] = xor i1 [[C]], true
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = sext i1 [[NOT_C]] to i64
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = sub i64 [[TMP0]], [[Y]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg = sub nsw i64 0, %y
+  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
+  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
+  ret i64 %r
+}
+
+define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_nuw(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_nuw(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[C:%.*]], i64 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT:%.*]] = xor i64 [[Y]], -1
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[C]], i64 0, i64 [[NOT]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg = sub nuw i64 0, %y
+  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
+  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
+  ret i64 %r
+}
+
+define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_nuw_nsw(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @fold_select_neg_not_nuw_nsw(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[C:%.*]], i64 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT:%.*]] = xor i64 [[Y]], -1
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[C]], i64 0, i64 [[NOT]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg = sub nuw nsw i64 0, %y
+  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
+  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
+  ret i64 %r
+}
+
+define i64 @no_fold_wrong_not_constant(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @no_fold_wrong_not_constant(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[C:%.*]], i64 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEG:%.*]] = sub i64 0, [[Y]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOTISH:%.*]] = xor i64 [[Y]], 123
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[C]], i64 [[NEG]], i64 [[NOTISH]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg = sub i64 0, %y
+  %notish = xor i64 %y, 123
+  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %notish
+  ret i64 %r
+}
+
+define i64 @no_fold_wrong_neg_operand(i1 %c, i64 %x, i64 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @no_fold_wrong_neg_operand(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[C:%.*]], i64 [[X:%.*]], i64 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEG:%.*]] = sub i64 0, [[X]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT:%.*]] = xor i64 [[Y]], -1
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[C]], i64 [[NEG]], i64 [[NOT]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg = sub i64 0, %x
+  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
+  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
+  ret i64 %r
+}
+
+define i64 @no_fold_wrong_neg_shape(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @no_fold_wrong_neg_shape(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[C:%.*]], i64 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEGISH:%.*]] = sub i64 1, [[Y]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT:%.*]] = xor i64 [[Y]], -1
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select i1 [[C]], i64 [[NEGISH]], i64 [[NOT]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[R]]
+;
+entry:
+  %negish = sub i64 1, %y
+  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
+  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %negish, i64 %not
+  ret i64 %r
+}
+
+define i64 @no_fold_multuse_neg(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @no_fold_multuse_neg(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[C:%.*]], i64 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEG:%.*]] = sub i64 0, [[Y]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT:%.*]] = xor i64 [[Y]], -1
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SUM:%.*]] = select i1 [[C]], i64 [[NEG]], i64 [[NOT]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use_i64(i64 [[NEG]])
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[SUM]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg = sub i64 0, %y
+  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
+  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
+  call void @use_i64(i64 %neg)
+  ret i64 %r
+}
+
+define i64 @no_fold_multuse_not(i1 %c, i64 %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define i64 @no_fold_multuse_not(
+; CHECK-SAME: i1 [[C:%.*]], i64 [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEG:%.*]] = sub i64 0, [[Y]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT:%.*]] = xor i64 [[Y]], -1
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SUM:%.*]] = select i1 [[C]], i64 [[NEG]], i64 [[NOT]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use_i64(i64 [[NOT]])
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret i64 [[SUM]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg = sub i64 0, %y
+  %not = xor i64 %y, -1
+  %r = select i1 %c, i64 %neg, i64 %not
+  call void @use_i64(i64 %not)
+  ret i64 %r
+}
+
+define <2 x i64> @fold_select_neg_not_vec_splat(<2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define <2 x i64> @fold_select_neg_not_vec_splat(
+; CHECK-SAME: <2 x i1> [[C:%.*]], <2 x i64> [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT_C:%.*]] = xor <2 x i1> [[C]], splat (i1 true)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[TMP0:%.*]] = sext <2 x i1> [[NOT_C]] to <2 x i64>
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = sub <2 x i64> [[TMP0]], [[Y]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i64> [[R]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg = sub <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, %y
+  %not = xor <2 x i64> %y, <i64 -1, i64 -1>
+  %r = select <2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %neg, <2 x i64> %not
+  ret <2 x i64> %r
+}
+
+define <2 x i64> @no_fold_select_neg_not_vec_non_splat(<2 x i1> %c,
+; CHECK-LABEL: define <2 x i64> @no_fold_select_neg_not_vec_non_splat(
+; CHECK-SAME: <2 x i1> [[C:%.*]], <2 x i64> [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEG:%.*]] = sub <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, [[Y]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT:%.*]] = xor <2 x i64> [[Y]], <i64 -1, i64 0>
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[C]], <2 x i64> [[NEG]], <2 x i64> [[NOT]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i64> [[R]]
+;
+  <2 x i64> %y) {
+entry:
+  %neg = sub <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, %y
+  %not = xor <2 x i64> %y, <i64 -1, i64 0>
+  %r = select <2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %neg, <2 x i64> %not
+  ret <2 x i64> %r
+}
+
+define <2 x i64> @no_fold_vec_mismatch(<2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %x,
+; CHECK-LABEL: define <2 x i64> @no_fold_vec_mismatch(
+; CHECK-SAME: <2 x i1> [[C:%.*]], <2 x i64> [[X:%.*]], <2 x i64> [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEG:%.*]] = sub <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, [[X]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT:%.*]] = xor <2 x i64> [[Y]], splat (i64 -1)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[R:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[C]], <2 x i64> [[NEG]], <2 x i64> [[NOT]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i64> [[R]]
+;
+  <2 x i64> %y) {
+entry:
+  %neg = sub <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, %x
+  %not = xor <2 x i64> %y, <i64 -1, i64 -1>
+  %r = select <2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %neg, <2 x i64> %not
+  ret <2 x i64> %r
+}
+
+define <2 x i64> @no_fold_vec_multuse(<2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %y) {
+; CHECK-LABEL: define <2 x i64> @no_fold_vec_multuse(
+; CHECK-SAME: <2 x i1> [[C:%.*]], <2 x i64> [[Y:%.*]]) {
+; CHECK-NEXT:  [[ENTRY:.*:]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NEG:%.*]] = sub <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, [[Y]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[NOT:%.*]] = xor <2 x i64> [[Y]], splat (i64 -1)
+; CHECK-NEXT:    [[SUM:%.*]] = select <2 x i1> [[C]], <2 x i64> [[NEG]], <2 x i64> [[NOT]]
+; CHECK-NEXT:    call void @use_v2i64(<2 x i64> [[NEG]])
+; CHECK-NEXT:    ret <2 x i64> [[SUM]]
+;
+entry:
+  %neg = sub <2 x i64> zeroinitializer, %y
+  %not = xor <2 x i64> %y, <i64 -1, i64 -1>
+  %r = select <2 x i1> %c, <2 x i64> %neg, <2 x i64> %not
+  call void @use_v2i64(<2 x i64> %neg)
+  ret <2 x i64> %r
+}

``````````

</details>
